mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workout ( member_id, gym_name, branch, record_date, difficulty_color, solved_count ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{gymName}, #{branch}, #{recordDate}, #{difficultyColor}, #{solvedCount})
mapper.select: SELECT id, member_id AS memberId, gym_name AS gymName, branch, record_date AS recordDate, difficulty_color AS difficultyColor, solved_count AS solvedCount FROM workout WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY record_date DESC, id DESC
